name: interactjs

en.when_to_use: Use it instead of a hand-written pointer state machine when arbitrary elements need free dragging, resizing from any edge, rotation, multi-touch pinch, grid snapping, boundary constraints, and inertia -- native implementations inevitably drift on edge deltas, touch, and snapping. It is not for list reordering (use sortablejs). The library does not move elements itself; the consuming AI applies transforms and sizes in move/end callbacks.
en.why_valuable: Free 2D movement plus resizing from any edge, rotation, multi-touch gestures, snapping/grid/boundary constraints, and inertia form a large and error-prone pointer state machine (pointer capture, delta calculation, constraint solving); an AI rewrite will drift at edges, ignore touch, and lose snapping.

data_in.note: Here, "data" is interaction configuration rather than a dataset: a selector plus action options. interact does not move elements -- the consuming AI must read event.dx/dy (drag) or event.rect (resize) in listeners.move and apply transforms/sizes itself. For targets inside shadow, pass { context: shadowRoot }.

schema.targetSelector: string | Element -- target for interact(); a CSS selector or element reference
schema.context?: Node -- element-resolution root; targets inside shadow must set this to shadowRoot; default document

draggable?.modifiers?: array -- for example interact.modifiers.restrictRect / snap / restrictSize; none by default

resizable?.edges: { top?, left?, bottom?, right?: boolean | string selector | Element } -- edges that may be resized

schema.listeners: { move, end } -- native callbacks wired by the consuming AI: apply transforms/sizes in move; the library does not do it

spec.note: The library has no built-in height; give the draggable/resizable stage container an explicit pixel height (no vh), with elements moving freely inside it.

when_to_use: 需要让任意元素自由拖拽/从任意边缩放/旋转/多指捏合并带网格吸附、边界限制与惯性时用它,而非手写指针状态机——原生在边缘增量、触摸与吸附上必然漂移;非做列表重排(用 sortablejs)。库本身不移动元素,move/end 回调里由消费 AI 自己应用 transform 与尺寸。
why_valuable: 自由二维移动 + 任意边 resize + 旋转 + 多指手势 + 吸附/网格/边界约束 + 惯性是一台庞大且易错的指针状态机(pointer capture、delta 计算、约束求解);AI 重写会在边缘漂移、忽略触摸、丢失吸附。

data_in.note: 这里的"data"是交互配置而非数据集:选择器 + action 选项。interact 不会移动元素——消费 AI 必须在 listeners.move 里读 event.dx/dy(拖拽)或 event.rect(缩放)自行应用 transform/尺寸。shadow 内目标须传 { context: shadowRoot }。

schema.targetSelector: string | Element —— interact() 的目标;CSS 选择器或元素引用
schema.context?: Node —— 元素解析根;shadow 内目标须设为 shadowRoot,默认 document

draggable?.inertia?: boolean —— 松手惯性,默认 false
draggable?.modifiers?: array —— 如 interact.modifiers.restrictRect / snap / restrictSize,默认无

resizable?.edges: { top?, left?, bottom?, right?: boolean | string选择器 | Element } —— 哪些边可拉伸

schema.listeners: { move, end } —— 由消费 AI 接原生回调:move 里应用 transform/尺寸;库不代劳

spec.note: 库无内建高度;draggable/resizable 的舞台容器须给显式像素高(禁 vh),元素在其中自由移动。

uplink: local-interact 默认不上行;拖拽/缩放结果若需外传,由消费 AI 在 end 回调里按载体处理,不预设统一事件契约。

carriers.widget: supported:传 { context: shadowRoot } 使 document 级指针委托解析 shadow 内目标;无 CSS 需注入
carriers.codex: supported:ESM CDN,document 级指针事件,无 worker/wasm/uplink 硬依赖

isolation.evidence: +esm default export interact(export{Fr as default});signature (target:Target, options?:Options):Interactable,Options.context?:Node 已在 @interactjs/core/options.d.ts:12 验证,Interactable defaultContext:Document|Element 且运行时用 ownerDocument(grep 8×)。globalEvents=yes:interact 在 document 级委托指针事件,故 shadow 内元素只有传 { context: shadowRoot } 才可拖拽(否则 retarget 的指针事件解析到 host 而非内部目标)。globalStyleInjection=no:不带 CSS,+esm 对 document.head 零写入。globalDomMutation=no:只改调用方自己的目标元素(transform/尺寸),无 body/head append。resizable.edges{top,left,bottom,right}(bool|选择器|Element)与 interact.modifiers.restrictRect/restrictEdges/restrictSize/snap + inertia 均已验证。shadowCompatible=conditional 仅取决于 context 选项。
